arts.ttl: Camarda Set for Monza Loan Move as Milan Agrees to Short-Term Deal
arts.sum: AC Milan's teenage sensation Francesco Camarda is on the verge of joining Serie A strugglers Monza on a loan deal. Calciomercato report that the move comes as Adriano Galliani, Monza's CEO and former Milan executive, continues his efforts to strengthen the team in the January transfer window. The post Camarda Set for Monza Loan Move as Milan Agrees to Short-Term Deal appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Milan agree teenage talent Camarda loan deal for Monza
arts.sum: Along with Alvaro Morata potentially joining Galatasaray, Milan have also agreed to loan Francesco Camarda...

arts.ttl: Preview: Monza vs. Hellas Verona - prediction, team news, lineups

arts.ttl: Monza Initiate Talks with Lazio for Castrovilli Transfer
arts.sum: Monza have emerged as one of the most active clubs in the current transfer window, continuing their ambitious moves in the market. After strengthening their defence, the Biancorossi have now set their sights on bolstering their midfield options.
